subjects.waitlistBetaCoupon: Pro — free for 1 month. Your beta access is ready.

brand.tagline: AI Cost Infrastructure · Zero code changes

layout.footerTransactional: This message is sent by GateCtr SAS in connection with the GateCtr service. If you believe you received it in error, contact {support}.

budgetFirewall.title: Budget Firewall
budgetFirewall.description: Hard caps. Soft alerts. No surprise invoices.

modelRouter.title: Model Router
modelRouter.description: GateCtr picks the right LLM. You pay less.

userWelcome.headline: You're in. Start saving.
userWelcome.body: Your account is live. Connect your first LLM provider and GateCtr starts optimizing immediately.

items.title: Budget Firewall
items.description: Hard caps. Soft alerts. No surprise invoices.

items.title: Model Router
items.description: GateCtr picks the right LLM. You pay less.

waitlistWelcome.preview: Position #{position} on the GateCtr waitlist. We'll email you when your spot opens.
waitlistWelcome.headline: You're in. Position #{position}.
waitlistWelcome.body: We'll email {email} when your spot opens. No spam. One email.

waitlistInvite.preview: Your GateCtr spot is open. {days} days left.
waitlistInvite.headline: Your spot is open.
waitlistInvite.body: Connect in 5 min. Your API key stays yours. GateCtr routes, optimizes, and controls — you just save.
waitlistInvite.step2: Add your LLM API keys (OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral…)
waitlistInvite.step3: Swap your endpoint URL. That's it.

teamInvitation.preview: {inviter} invited you to join {team} on GateCtr
teamInvitation.headline: You've been invited to join {team}
teamInvitation.body: {inviter} invited you to join the {team} team as {role}. Connect in 5 min. Your API key stays yours.

onboardingComplete.preview: {workspace} is ready. Your first request is already optimized.
onboardingComplete.headline: Setup complete. GateCtr is live.
onboardingComplete.body: Your workspace "{workspace}" is configured. Every LLM request now goes through GateCtr — optimized, measured, and under budget control.

stepsWithProvider.title: Make your first API call
stepsWithProvider.description: Swap your endpoint URL. Keep your existing code. Done.

stepsWithProvider.title: Install the SDK
stepsWithProvider.description: npm install @gatectr/sdk — or use the REST API. Quickstart: docs.gatectr.com/docs/getting-started/quickstart

stepsWithProvider.title: Set up a webhook
stepsWithProvider.description: Get Slack or Teams alerts when you hit 80% of your budget.

stepsWithoutProvider.title: Connect a provider
stepsWithoutProvider.description: Add your OpenAI, Anthropic, or Mistral key in Settings → Providers.

stepsWithoutProvider.title: Make your first API call
stepsWithoutProvider.description: Swap your endpoint URL. Keep your existing code.

stepsWithoutProvider.title: Install the SDK
stepsWithoutProvider.description: npm install @gatectr/sdk — or use the REST API. Quickstart: docs.gatectr.com/docs/getting-started/quickstart

onboardingComplete.hint: Questions? Reply to this email — we read every one.

billingUpgrade.preview: You're now on {plan}. More power, same control.
billingUpgrade.headline: {plan} is active.
billingUpgrade.body: Your plan has been upgraded to {plan}. New limits and features are live immediately. No restart needed.
billingUpgrade.hint: Questions about your billing? Reply to this email.

billingReceipt.headline: Payment confirmed.
billingReceipt.body: Your GateCtr subscription has been renewed. Here's your receipt.
billingReceipt.hint: Questions about this charge? Reply to this email.

billingPaymentFailed.preview: Payment failed. Update your payment method to keep access.
billingPaymentFailed.headline: Payment failed.
billingPaymentFailed.body: We couldn't process your payment. Update your payment method to keep your plan active. Access continues for now — act before your next retry.
billingPaymentFailed.hint: Need help? Reply to this email.

billingRenewalReminder.headline: Renewal in 7 days.
billingRenewalReminder.body: Your subscription renews on {date} for {amount}. No action needed — we'll charge your card on file automatically.
billingRenewalReminder.hint: Want to change your plan? Visit billing settings.

billingDowngrade.preview: Your plan has been downgraded to Free.
billingDowngrade.headline: You're on the Free plan.
billingDowngrade.body: Your subscription has ended and your account has been moved to the Free plan. Your data is safe — you just have fewer limits now.
billingDowngrade.hint: Changed your mind? Reactivate anytime — no setup required.

billingCancellation.preview: Your {plan} subscription is scheduled to cancel on {date}.
billingCancellation.headline: Cancellation scheduled.
billingCancellation.body: Your {plan} subscription will not renew. You keep full access until your current period ends.
billingCancellation.resumeHint: Changed your mind? You can resume your subscription anytime before that date.

userSuspended.preview: Your GateCtr account has been temporarily suspended.
userSuspended.headline: Your account has been suspended.
userSuspended.body: Your GateCtr account has been temporarily suspended. You cannot sign in or make API requests during this period.
userSuspended.info: This suspension is temporary. Our team will review your account and contact you within 48 hours.
userSuspended.appeal: If you believe this is a mistake, you can appeal by contacting our support team.

userBanned.preview: Your GateCtr account has been permanently banned.
userBanned.headline: Your account has been banned.
userBanned.body: Your GateCtr account has been permanently banned. All active sessions have been terminated and API access has been revoked.
userBanned.dataNote: Your data will be retained for 30 days in accordance with our data retention policy, then permanently deleted.
userBanned.contact: If you believe this decision is incorrect, contact us at

userReactivated.preview: Your GateCtr account has been reactivated.
userReactivated.headline: Your account is active again.
userReactivated.body: Your GateCtr account has been reactivated. You can sign in and resume using the platform immediately.

userDeleted.preview: Your GateCtr account has been deleted.
userDeleted.headline: Your account has been deleted.
userDeleted.body: Your GateCtr account and all associated data have been permanently deleted. All active sessions have been terminated.
userDeleted.dataNote: In accordance with GDPR and our data retention policy, any residual data will be purged within 30 days.
userDeleted.contact: If you did not request this or have questions, contact us at

waitlistBetaCoupon.preview: You're in the first 100. Pro is on us — 1 month, $0.
waitlistBetaCoupon.headline: Beta access. Pro plan. Free.
waitlistBetaCoupon.body: You joined as ##{position} on the waitlist. You're in the first 100 — so Pro is on us for a full month. No card needed. No catch.
waitlistBetaCoupon.couponMeta: 100% off · Pro plan · 1 month · Single use
waitlistBetaCoupon.detail1: Context Optimizer — up to 40% fewer tokens
waitlistBetaCoupon.detail2: Model Router — cheapest model per request
